title: Kyiv: 700 drones launched
description: Update: Massive Russian ballistic missile, drone attack on Kyiv kills 1, injures 24. The number of injured victims in Russia's overnight missile and drone attack on Kyiv and the surrounding region has risen to 24, officials reported. Monitoring groups reported that more than 50 Russian missiles and upwards of 700 drones were launched towards Ukraine, almost entirely targeting the capital region,...
description_en: Update: Massive Russian ballistic missile, drone attack on Kyiv kills 1, injures 24. The number of injured victims in Russia's overnight missile and drone attack on Kyiv and the surrounding region has risen to 24, officials reported. Monitoring groups reported that more than 50 Russian missiles and upwards of 700 drones were launched towards Ukraine, almost entirely targeting the capital region,...

title: Missile attack on residential area
description: As a result of the enemy's massive attack on the capital, damage was recorded in all areas of the city, Kyiv Mayor Vitaly Klychko said. In the Darnytskyi district, as a result of the fall of UAV debris and missiles, a dormitory building, several non-residential premises, a service station and cars parked near a residential building were damaged. In the Obolonsky district, the UAV hit a private one-story residential building. Also as a result of hitting...
description_en: As a result of the enemy's massive attack on the capital, damage was recorded in all areas of the city, Kyiv Mayor Vitaly Klychko said. In the Darnytskyi district, as a result of the fall of UAV debris and missiles, a dormitory building, several non-residential premises, a service station and cars parked near a residential building were damaged. In the Obolonsky district, the UAV hit a private one-story residential building. Also as a result of hitting...
description_uk: В результате массированной атаки врага на столицу повреждения зафиксированы во всех районах города, сообщил мэр Киева Виталий Кличко, В Дарницком районе в результате падения обломков БПЛА и ракет повреждено здание общежития, несколько нежилых помещений, СТО и автомобили, припаркованные возле жилого дома. В Оболонском районе БПЛА попал в частный 1-этажный жилой дом. Также в результате попадания...

title: Kyiv: Missile attack on residential area
title_en: Kyiv: Missile attack on residential area
description: Update: Damage reported in every district of Kyiv amid massive Russian missile, drone attack. Officials reported that over 40 locations in Kyiv have sustained damage in the large-scale overnight Russian missile and drone attack on the capital. At least seven residential buildings have been struck in Kyiv, officials reported.
description_en: Update: Damage reported in every district of Kyiv amid massive Russian missile, drone attack. Officials reported that over 40 locations in Kyiv have sustained damage in the large-scale overnight Russian missile and drone attack on the capital. At least seven residential buildings have been struck in Kyiv, officials reported.

Officials reported that over 40 locations in Kyiv have sustained damage in the large-scale overnight Russian missile and drone attack on the capital. At least seven residential buildings have been struck in Kyiv, officials reported.

title: Kyiv: 6 injured
description: Updated: At least 6 injured in massive Russian missile, drone attack on Kyiv. The number of injured victims in Russia's massive overnight missile and drone attack on Kyiv has grown to at least six people, officials reported. The attack is ongoing, with additional waves of missile and drone strikes being reported.

title: Kyiv: Missile launch detected
description: Multiple explosions heard in Kyiv amid missile threat. A series of explosions was heard around 1 a.m. local time, according to Kyiv Independent journalists on the ground. Ahead of the explosions, Ukraine's Air Force warned of the threat of incoming Russian missile strikes on the capital, including the possible launch of an Oreshnik medium-range missile.
description_en: Multiple explosions heard in Kyiv amid missile threat. A series of explosions was heard around 1 a.m. local time, according to Kyiv Independent journalists on the ground. title: Kharkiv: Casualties reported
description: Russian strikes injure civilians in Odesa, Kharkiv oblasts as drones rock Kyiv. Civilian casualties were reported in Odesa and Kharkiv oblasts while drones targeted Kyiv after President Volodymyr Zelensky warned that Russia was preparing a broader assault across Ukraine.

title: 000 drones launched
description: Monitoring channels write about the increased threat of the strategic aviation of the Russian Federation to strike Ukraine this night. It is also reported that the Russians have concentrated about 1,000 UAVs on launch pads. The first launched drones are already entering the airspace of Ukraine.
description_en: Monitoring channels write about the increased threat of the strategic aviation of the Russian Federation to strike Ukraine this night. It is also reported that the Russians have concentrated about 1,000 UAVs on launch pads. The first launched drones are already entering the airspace of Ukraine.
description_uk: Мониторинговые каналы пишут о повышенной угрозе вылета стратегической авиации рф для ударов по Украине этой ночью. Также сообщается, что россияне сосредоточили около 1000 БПЛА на пусковых площадках. Первые запущенные дроны уже заходят в воздушное пространство Украины.
